entries.content: adjective 两个 liǎng gè▸ both his eyes/parents 他的双眼/双亲▸ both children came 两个孩子都来了▸ both sides of the road 路的两边
entries.label: A
entries.name: adjective

entries.content: adverb ▸ both … and …; 不仅…而且… bùjǐn… érqiě…▸ to show both firmness and tact 表现得既坚定又策略▸ both you and I saw him 你和我都看见他了▸ to act both wisely and swiftly 明智且迅速地行动
entries.label: B
entries.name: adverb

entries.content: pronoun plus plural verb 两个都 liǎng gè dōu▸ they speak English or French or both 他们说英语或法语或两种语言都说▸ which do you want? — both 你想要哪一个？──两个都要
entries.label: C
entries.name: pronoun plus plural verb 两个都 liǎng gè dōu▸ they speak english or french or both 他们说英语或法语或两种语言都说▸ which do you want? — both 你想要哪一个？──两个都要

entries.content: both of pronoun phrase plus plural verb …两个都 … liǎng gè dōu▸ let's take both of them 我们把两个都带上吧▸ both of you are wrong 你们俩都错了
entries.label: D
entries.name: both of
